Log \#19  
Prompt: Take this application and make the following changes: The reel icons are not centered, so please center them and shrink them if necessary so that it fits the entire icon in the middle of its reel. We also noticed that you can switch game modes when you roll. Make it so you can’t switch game modes while spinning. The machine core still overlaps with the logs when the results are generated. Please fix that, that is the most important thing.

Observations:   
🎯 Iteration 19 — What changed  
🎰 Reel Icon Centering  
Centered the reel icons inside each reel window so they sit properly in the middle  
Reduced icon bounds in both 3-reel and 5-reel modes so the full symbol stays visible  
Prevented symbol overflow/clipping by tightening the icon container sizing  
🔒 Game Mode Lock During Spins  
Blocked game mode changes while the reels are actively spinning  
Added a second guard in the mode button click handler so rapid clicks cannot switch modes mid-roll  
Synced the spinning state to the page so mode chips also ignore pointer input during a spin  
📐 Machine Core / Score Panel Separation  
Rebalanced the main cabinet grid so the center machine and right score rail keep their own space  
Collapsed the right-side scoreboard to a single clean column instead of forcing two cramped stat columns  
Added overflow guards to the score cards and rules area so they stop spilling into the machine core  
Adjusted the feedback row and bonus cluster sizing so the center content no longer collides with the right panel  
🧾 Result / Log Spacing  
Added more bottom spacing around the machine core and reel/result section  
Gave the result overlay more room to open below the reels instead of crowding adjacent content  
Kept the Recent Spins section separated below the cabinet grid so the result area does not visually crash into it  
⚡ Net Effect  
Reel icons now sit centered and fully inside their reels  
Players can’t switch between Classic and Big 5-Reel while a spin is in progress  
The machine core, feedback area, and result cards no longer overlap the right-side score panel like in the screenshot  
The Recent Spins area stays visually separated from the machine when results appear  
Verification: npm.cmd run check:js and npm.cmd test both pass.

Validation:   
No HTML or CSS errors

Visual:   
![][image1]

Improvements: 

* The icons in the machine slots are still not centered for the 5-reel game mode. We want this fixed so the machine is consistent between different container sizes  
* Upper components are still overlapping, and we don’t want that so it is easier on the eyes and less confusing for the user

New Prompt Brainstorming:   
Take this application and make the following changes: Improve the visibility of the reel icons, as they are still cut off and barely visible, especially for the 5-reel game mode. Also, the upper components are still overlapping when the machine is not rolling, so please fix that so it doesn’t overlap and is flush with the slot machine web application.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
